title: Nipping the Seeds of Conflict in the Bud

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Umm—— 
The space I reserved is——

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whyyy are you here? 
I reserved this place!!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Aren't you the one who's mistaken!? I'm the one who reserved it! And I'm the one who's gonna win the next race, too!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What was that!? 
Bring it on! Right here, right now, 
let's make it clear who's better——

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Umm—— If you don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Please feel free to use the space I reserved, too—— Would you like to practice together? Dancing together—— is sure to be wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text:
Eh! The salad to top off my day… 
There's only one left!?

text_block_list.name: Dieting Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I'm on a diet… Gran, I'm absolutely not backing down.

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are you saying we should settle this with a race? Nice, nice! Sounds fun! In that case, how many miles should we——

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
If you'd like—— please take mine. 
It's on the table over there.

text_block_list.name: Gran Alegria
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you sure? 
But then you won't have any, Bouquet…

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: I don't mind—— It should be restocked again in a little while, anyway. Please, go ahead.

…Today was a day where I saw 
Curren Bouquetd'or everywhere I went.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
——Good work today. 
Hehe, we keep running into each other.
It seems she noticed as well. So, I decide to tell her what I thought about her actions today.
choice_data_list: Are you not fond of conflict?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
——Yes, I suppose so. Regarding conflict—— I just want to protect—— 
everyone's peaceful time together.
Sharing a space, giving up her salad.
Even though they were small things, she did them so naturally. And while avoiding conflict, it also made me——
choice_data_list: I think that you're just really kind

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: ——Am I? Sometimes, there are people who tell me that—— but I've never really—— thought about it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
However—— 
I love 『Harmony』

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Just like how many flowers—— 
come together to form one beautiful bouquet. I just love—— peaceful times and spaces.
choice_data_list: <size=34>Looking at you, I kind of get it</size>
<size=34>Looking at you, I kind of get it</size>
<size=34>Maybe that 『Harmony』 is what makes you so kind</size>

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: Just like how many flowers—— come together to form one beautiful bouquet. I just love—— peaceful times and spaces.
choice_data_list: <size=34>Looking at you, I kind of get it</size>
<size=34>Looking at you, I kind of get it</size>
<size=34>Maybe that 『Harmony』 is what makes you so kind</size>

text_block_list.text: Looking at Curren Bouquetd'or's gentle demeanor, it feels as if she embodies harmony itself. When I tell her that——

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: ——Y-You're exaggerating. I'm not such a grand Horsegirl. …But—— Thank you.
Curren Bouquetd'or smiles softly, like a blooming flower.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: A Trainer who can call someone 『Kind』 like that—— seems like a kind person to me, too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
——Hehe. This is almost like we're——
showering each other with praise, isn't it?
We both feel a bit embarrassed and laugh it off.
